profile_summary: I'm a Full-Stack Developer based in Ludwigshafen am Rhein, Germany, with a background in web development, software engineering, and game design. I enjoy building end-to-end solutions and working seamlessly across various programming languages and web frameworks. Beyond just writing code, I value strong project management to ensure ideas actually make it to production efficiently and on time. When I’m not at my keyboard, I’m usually tinkering with electronics, keeping up with new tech, or tending to my garden. I also enjoy winding down with gaming, anime, and web novels. I speak fluent German and English, and I always aim to bring a practical, creative approach to the software I build.

tasks: Development of an Download Manager as a Prototype in PHP and than in Svelte
Development of an Web Application for the Management of a Cleaning Company
Development of an Web Application for the Management of an QR Code based Redirection System
Development of Apps, Plugins, Wrappers and Apis for Deta.space
Development of an Web Application which enables playing retro games in the Browser based on WASM Compiled Emulators.
Development of an Android Application to read Web & Light Novels from different Providers in an unified UI.
Development of an API & Crawler to build an index of Web & Light Novels from different Providers.
Some Prototype ML/AI Applications which can generate Content, Images, Translate etc. which is used in different Projects.
Development of an Network Bridge between Web/Cloud to VisualBasic Application
Development of an Application/API to automate Facebook Events
Development of an APP for the Android and iOS Platform for Room Booking
Planned and ReDesigned a Cloud/Web based Management System
Planned, Developed and Managed a booking, website and web2print system for cinemas (pmkino) using PhalconPHP, Wordpress, MongoDB, Python, NodeJS and ReactJS
Developed a Web2Print solution using PhalconPHP, Wordpress, MongoDB, Python, NodeJS and ReactJS
Developed a Wordpress Plugin and Theme environment for Messe Bremen Events, which was used in 10+ Websites.

project_achievements.title: Client Projects (NDA)
project_achievements.description: Ongoing full-stack development, API design, cloud infrastructure, and software consulting for various clients. Details protected by non-disclosure agreements.

project_achievements.title: LLM Applications & AI Integration
project_achievements.description: Development of applications and workflows leveraging large language models including local LLM deployment (ollama, llama.cpp), Open WebUI, RAG pipelines, prompt engineering, and API wrappers for multiple AI providers.

project_achievements.title: AI Image Generation Pipeline
project_achievements.description: Design and implementation of AI image generation pipelines using Stable Diffusion (ComfyUI, Automatic1111), custom LoRA training, batch generation and upscaling automation, and integration into existing workflows.

project_achievements.title: Deta-PHP
project_achievements.description: PHP SDK for interacting with the Deta API. Provides a Deta client class for accessing Deta Base (NoSQL database) and Deta Drive (file storage).

project_achievements.title: Deta-PHP-Engine
project_achievements.description:
PHP Runtime / Engine for Deta.Space. Based on PHP Version 8.1.8 using the Internal Webserver. Supports a wide range of PHP extensions including bcmath, curl, dom, gd, mbstring, mongodb, mysqlnd, pdo_mysql, pdo_sqlite, redis, simplexml, soap, sqlite3, swoole, tokenizer, xml, zip, and more.

Features:
- PHP 8.1.8
- Internal Webserver
- Support for multiple PHP Micros by duplicating the php folder and spacefile config
- Custom php.ini support via --with-config-file

project_achievements.title: Deta-PHP-Sandbox
project_achievements.description:
Online Sandbox / Playground / Console to quickly test PHP code, deployed on Deta Space. Provides an interactive environment where users can paste PHP code, hit run, and see results in real-time without needing a local development setup.

Features syntax highlighting, code completion, and error handling. Accessible from anywhere, at any time, without additional software. Available at: https://deta.space/discovery/@tuefekci/phpsandbox

project_achievements.title: deta-queue
project_achievements.description: Queue implementation for use with Deta Base, written in TypeScript. Provides a simple FIFO queue backed by Deta's NoSQL database with configurable TTL and queue name. Published as npm package `deta-queue`.

project_achievements.title: deta-s3-server
project_achievements.description:
S3 Server for Deta.Space (Deta Drive) written in NodeJS based on jamhall/s3rver. A simple S3-compatible server that uses Deta Drive as a backend. Not a full S3 implementation — provides basic S3 API compatibility for storing and retrieving files via Deta Drive.

Available on Deta Space Discovery: https://deta.space/discovery/@tuefekci/s3server

project_achievements.title: flatfilecache
project_achievements.description: Node.js flat file cache library written in TypeScript. Provides a simple file-based caching mechanism using the local filesystem, suitable for scenarios where a full database or Redis cache is not needed.

project_achievements.title: novelsource-proxy
project_achievements.description: Proxy server for novel sources, complementing novelsourcePHP. Provides a proxy layer for web novel scraping operations, handling routing and requests between the scraping client and target novel sites.

project_achievements.title: novelsourcePHP
project_achievements.description:
A collection of webnovel/novel sources offering varying amounts of scraping capability. Primarily built for meta data aggregation (tags and genres for recommendation) rather than content scraping.

Available as a Composer package: `tuefekci/novelsource`. Supports novel source adapters with search and last-checked tracking. Inspired by mensch272/novelsave_sources (Python) but built for PHP use cases.

project_achievements.title: blkhole
project_achievements.description:
Blkhole serves as a download management tool designed for AllDebrid cloud downloads, facilitating the seamless automation of downloads directly to your local network.

Key features:
- User-friendly web interface for management of alldebrid.com downloads, cloud Torrent, Magnet, and DDL links
- Automated category-based downloading of completed cloud tasks to the local file system
- Download enhancements and optimizations
- Supports Magnet links, DDL links, Torrents, Chunked Downloads
- Bandwidth and connection limitation
- Automatic cleanup of finished and failed downloads
- Tested with Radarr and Sonarr

project_achievements.title: docker-radarr-xu4
project_achievements.description: Docker configuration to run Radarr on an ODROID-XU4 single-board computer. Provides a containerized setup for the Radarr movie management tool optimized for ARM-based hardware.

project_achievements.title: docker-sonarr-xu4
project_achievements.description: Docker configuration to run Sonarr on an ODROID-XU4 single-board computer. Includes a workaround to force the mono process onto one set of cores (big cores 4,5,6,7 and small cores 0,1,2,3) to resolve performance issues on the big.LITTLE ARM architecture.

project_achievements.title: helpers
project_achievements.description:
Personal PHP helper library following PSR-4 autoloading and PSR-2 coding standards. Includes unit testing with PHPUnit 6, comprehensive guide and tutorial, and easy integration with any framework or plain PHP.

Requirements: PHP >= 7.0, Composer. Uses a standard project structure with build/, src/, tests/ directories, Travis CI configuration, and code sniffing tools (PHPCS, PHPCBF).

project_achievements.title: overcli
project_achievements.description:
OverCLI is a PHP CLI / TUI Helper / Framework Library with a Render Loop, similar to how Game Engines handle application rendering. A collection of useful functions and classes for building CLI and TUI applications.

Features:
- Render Loop for continuous rendering with events
- Exception renderer for static error display
- Demo applications including a PIN IDENTIFICATION PROGRAM inspired by T2 Movie Prop
- Fully dependent on the Runtime, framerate is stable with fine memory usage

Requirements: PHP 7.2+ and Composer.

project_achievements.title: php-benchmark
project_achievements.description:
Benchmarking PHP7, PHP8, and PHP7-parallel performance on an i7-4790k with 16GB DDR3. Tests include math operations, string manipulation, loops, and if/else conditions with 1,000,000 iterations across 16 workers.

Results (2021-10-04):
- PHP 7.4.24: Total 79.612s (serial)
- PHP 7.4.24-parallel: Total 9.361s (16 workers)
- PHP 8.0.11: Total 69.053s (serial)

Conclusion: PHP8 performs better than PHP7 especially in string manipulation, while parallel processing on PHP7 delivers the fastest results for suitable workloads.

project_achievements.title: Android Web / Light Novel Reader

project_achievements.title: QR Code Redirect System

project_achievements.title: ReactNative CRM Task/Todo App

project_achievements.title: phpkg
project_achievements.description:
Package your PHP project into an executable for Linux, Mac and Windows. Provides source code protection by compiling PHP projects into standalone executables. Includes benchmark comparisons between the packaged (phpkg) version and native PHP 8.1.3 on an i5-8259U CPU.

Benchmark results showed minimal performance difference between phpkg and native PHP execution (64.334s vs 67.316s total for math, string, loop, and if/else tests), indicating the packaging adds negligible overhead.

project_achievements.title: SchokoFoto
project_achievements.description: Webshop for personalized chocolate photo products. Customers could upload their own photos and have them printed on chocolate packaging. The system included image processing and automatic PDF print data generation.

project_achievements.title: Battlehost – Hosting Management
project_achievements.description: A hosting management system for game servers and web hosting, enabling customer management, invoicing, and server management.

project_achievements.title: ISH Webhosting Plattform
project_achievements.description: A web hosting platform with automated customer management, including administration interface, customer login, and invoicing.

project_achievements.title: Alkohol.in – Graphics Renderer & iOS UI Sim
project_achievements.description: Experimental PHP project with dynamic graphics generation using the GD Library. The project included server-side image rendering and a simulator-like iOS UI replica in HTML/JavaScript/CSS.

project_achievements.title: LudumDare48 Game (Hobby)
project_achievements.description: A game developed with HTML5 and Canvas for the LudumDare48 game development competition.

project_achievements.title: SaveFM Desktop & Mobile App
project_achievements.description: An app for automated recording and playback of radio stations built with Node-Webkit and PhoneGap, recording web radio streams and sharing via the cloud.

project_achievements.title: Alkohol.in Grafik Renderer
project_achievements.description: A PHP-based graphics render script simulating iOS UI elements for Alkohol.in, a humor and entertainment portal.

project_achievements.title: Verwaltungssoftware für Webhoster (Hostnetzwerk)
project_achievements.description: Administration software for web hosts with frontend, backend, and PDF invoicing, developed with PHP, MySQL, HTML, and CSS.

project_achievements.title: Virtual Currency / Bitcoin Tooling
project_achievements.description: Experiments and tooling in the field of virtual currencies and early Bitcoin integration. The project included Flash-based interfaces and PHP backend components for cryptocurrency APIs and transaction processing.

project_achievements.title: Flash Games & Websites
project_achievements.description: Development of various Flash games and interactive Flash websites with ActionScript 2.0 programming and PHP backend integration.

project_achievements.title: Clan Websites
project_achievements.description: Gaming clan websites with phpBB forum integration, designed with Fireworks MX and implemented as HTML table layouts.
